profile.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
profile.positioning_statement: Full-Stack Software Engineer specializing in Backend Systems, Cloud Infrastructure, DevOps, Automation, Distributed Systems, and Modern Web Applications

professional_summary: Full-stack software engineer with 4 years of experience building distributed systems, backend platforms, cloud infrastructure, and DevOps automation. Designed distributed worker systems processing data from 50+ government portals, event-driven cloud platforms with observability, and automated CI/CD pipelines. Built financial workflow platforms, real-time collaboration systems, and multi-tenant SaaS applications.

professional_experience.overview: Working as a DevSecOps and Full-Stack Engineer building cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, automation systems, distributed backend services, and production deployment workflows.
responsibilities: Design and implement cloud-native backend infrastructure on AWS
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitLab CI/CD
Develop Infrastructure as Code solutions using CloudFormation and Terraform
Configure containerized deployments using Docker and AWS ECS
Build event-driven backend services using AWS SNS, SQS, and EventBridge
Implement observability using CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki
Automate software delivery, deployment, monitoring, and operational workflows
Improve security, deployment reliability, and production automation

professional_experience.overview: Developed modern React and React Native applications for multiple client projects, focusing on user experience, reusable components, API integration, and scalable frontend architecture.
responsibilities: Develop React and React Native applications
Build reusable UI components and application layouts
Integrate REST APIs and backend services
Implement authentication and role-based workflows
Manage application state and frontend architecture
Optimize application performance and responsiveness
Collaborate with backend developers and designers

professional_experience.overview: Developed a React Native mobile commerce application integrated with a headless Shopify backend.
responsibilities: Develop mobile application features using React Native
Integrate Shopify GraphQL APIs
Build product catalog and order management workflows
Synchronize inventory and order information
Improve application performance and usability
Collaborate with backend and product teams

professional_experience.overview: Worked on full-stack web applications across e-commerce, restaurant management, and financial workflow systems using the MERN stack.
responsibilities: Develop backend APIs using Node.js and Express
Build React-based frontend applications
Design MongoDB data models
Implement authentication and authorization
Integrate third-party services and cloud storage
Develop workflow-based business applications

professional_experience.overview: Delivered freelance MERN stack projects for international clients, building responsive web applications and REST APIs while managing complete project lifecycles from requirements to deployment.
responsibilities: Build full-stack MERN applications
Develop REST APIs using Node.js and Express
Build React user interfaces
Design MongoDB database schemas
Deploy client applications
Maintain client communication and project delivery

projects.name: Tender Procurement Intelligence Platform
projects.business_domain: Procurement intelligence and government tender data extraction
projects.architecture_style: Queue-based distributed worker system with Playwright automation and ETL pipelines
projects.overview: Distributed scraping system with queue-based Playwright workers and ETL pipelines processing data from 50+ government portals.
engineering_contributions: Designed a distributed worker architecture using 20 parallel Playwright workers to process procurement data from 50+ government portals
Implemented ETL pipelines with validation, transformation, and deduplication for reliable data processing
Reduced processing from hours of manual effort to approximately 5-minute automated cycles using queue-driven parallel execution
Built checkpoint recovery patterns and fault-tolerant retry handling for distributed worker reliability

measurable_outcomes.improvement: reduced from hours of manual effort

projects.name: Event-Driven Processing Platform on AWS
projects.business_domain: Cloud processing platform and asynchronous backend operations
projects.architecture_style: Event-driven cloud platform using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, Redis pub/sub, and full observability
projects.overview: Production-grade event-driven cloud platform using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, Redis pub/sub, and full observability.
engineering_contributions: Designed event-driven architecture using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, and EventBridge for asynchronous processing
Implemented Redis pub/sub for real-time communication and distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry and AWS X-Ray
Built observability stack with Prometheus, Loki, CloudWatch, and structured logging for production monitoring
Configured retry logic, dead-letter queues, and circuit breakers for failure isolation and recoverability

projects.name: DevOps CI/CD Pipeline System
projects.business_domain: Software delivery automation and release operations
projects.architecture_style: Automated delivery pipeline covering build, test, security scanning, containerization, deployment, monitoring, and rollback
projects.overview: Automated delivery pipeline covering build, test, security scanning, Docker containerization, deployment, monitoring, and rollback.
engineering_contributions: Automated build, test, security scanning, Docker containerization, and deployment workflows using Jenkins and GitLab CI/CD
Implemented Infrastructure as Code with CloudFormation and Terraform for reproducible environment provisioning
Configured zero-downtime deployment patterns with rollback support for production reliability
Integrated SonarQube and Snyk for automated security scanning and code quality checks

projects.name: Tax Rebate Processing & Refund Management Platform
projects.business_domain: Tax rebate processing, financial workflow, refund management
projects.architecture_style: State-controlled workflow platform for onboarding, verification, document processing, calculation, review, approval, and reconciliation
projects.overview: State-controlled workflow platform for onboarding, identity verification, document processing, tax calculations, staff review, refund approval, and reconciliation.
engineering_contributions: Designed a state-controlled workflow engine with explicit lifecycle states for financial processing operations
Built backend systems for identity verification, document processing, configurable tax calculations, and staff review workflows
Centralized refund approval and reconciliation processes replacing manual forms and spreadsheet tracking
Implemented role-based access control and strict state transitions for auditability and process reliability

projects.name: Handyman Marketplace System
projects.architecture_style: Full-stack marketplace platform with frontend, backend, authentication, payments, real-time workflows, and scalable infrastructure
projects.overview: Full-stack marketplace platform with authentication, payments, real-time workflows, and scalable backend infrastructure.
engineering_contributions: Built marketplace workflows connecting service participants with authentication and payment integration
Designed scalable backend architecture supporting real-time coordination and service operations
Centralized authentication, payment processing, and workflow operations in a unified platform

projects.name: Virtual Office - Real-Time Workspace
projects.architecture_style: Presence-based collaboration platform with dynamic user states and WebSocket real-time interactions
projects.overview: Presence-based collaboration platform with dynamic user states and WebSocket interactions.
engineering_contributions: Implemented WebSocket-based real-time communication for live user presence and state changes
Designed dynamic user state management for workspace interaction visibility
Built presence-driven collaboration features for distributed team coordination

projects.name: Briefly - Multi-Tenant SaaS
projects.architecture_style: Multi-workspace SaaS platform with role-based access, structured reporting, and real-time workflow automation
projects.overview: Multi-workspace SaaS platform with role-based access, structured reporting, and real-time workflow automation.
engineering_contributions: Designed multi-tenant SaaS architecture with workspace boundaries and role-based access control
Built structured reporting workflows and real-time automation across multiple workspaces
Centralized role-based workflow and reporting for improved team visibility

projects.name: CopyFlow - Workflow Management System
projects.architecture_style: Role-based document lifecycle system with strict state transitions and permission control
projects.overview: Role-based document lifecycle system with strict state transitions and permission control.
engineering_contributions: Designed role-based document lifecycle architecture with strict state transitions
Implemented permission control across workflow stages and user roles
Built controlled document processing workflow reducing ambiguity in lifecycle operations

projects.name: Nutrifactor Mobile Commerce Platform
projects.architecture_style: Headless Shopify mobile commerce integration using React Native and Shopify GraphQL
projects.overview: React Native mobile commerce platform using headless Shopify and Shopify GraphQL with real-time inventory and order synchronization.
engineering_contributions: Integrated React Native with Shopify GraphQL for product, inventory, and order workflows
Built mobile commerce experience over headless Shopify backend with real-time synchronization
Synchronized inventory and orders between mobile app and commerce backend

engineering_achievements: Designed a distributed scraping system with 20 parallel workers completing full extraction and processing cycles in approximately 5 minutes per batch
Automated procurement data extraction across 50+ government portals using queue-based Playwright workers and ETL pipelines
Reduced full environment provisioning to single-command deployment using Infrastructure as Code with CloudFormation and Terraform
Built event-driven processing using AWS CloudFormation, ECS Fargate, SNS/SQS, MongoDB, Redis pub/sub, and distributed tracing
Implemented comprehensive observability using Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, CloudWatch, AWS X-Ray, and Loki
Built controlled workflow systems for tax rebate processing, refund management, document lifecycle control, and multi-tenant SaaS workflow automation
Automated CI/CD pipeline with Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, Docker, SonarQube, and Snyk for security scanning

education.institution: National University of Computer and Emerging Sciences (NUCES LHR)

full_stack_product_engineering.description: Designing and building complete product systems across frontend, backend, data, workflow, and infrastructure layers

backend_systems.description: Building backend platforms with APIs, authentication, multi-tenant structures, workflow engines, data processing, and operational boundaries

distributed_systems.description: Designing systems that use parallel workers, asynchronous queues, event-driven processing, fault tolerance, and horizontal scaling

cloud_infrastructure.description: Designing and operating secure, scalable, observable production environments on AWS

devops_engineering.description: Automating build, test, security scanning, containerization, deployment, and environment provisioning workflows

workflow_systems.description: Modeling operational processes as controlled workflows with explicit states, permissions, reviews, approvals, and reconciliation

event_driven_systems.description: Building asynchronous systems that communicate through queues, events, background workers, and pub/sub channels

real_time_systems.description: Building systems that communicate state changes to users through real-time interaction patterns

data_processing_systems.description: Building extraction, aggregation, transformation, validation, and deduplication workflows for structured data pipelines

observability_production_operations.description: Making systems measurable, diagnosable, recoverable, and operable under production conditions
